title: A Quality Checkup On IDEXX Laboratories
text: IDEXX Laboratories is operating in an industry with good tailwinds. Over the last decade, IDEXX Laboratories returned 22% annually, but future returns will likely be much lower.

title: Don't Miss the Turnaround in These 3 Stocks
text: I'm on the hunt for stocks to buy that are primed for a turnaround in the final quarter of 2022 and into 2023.  But what constitutes a turnaround?
